description_long: This ornate vase features a wide, shallow bowl with a flared rim, supported by a sturdy, tapering pedestal base. The exterior is adorned with intricate gold embellishments, including stylized animal motifs and inlaid colored gemstones, giving it an ancient Egyptian-inspired aesthetic. The rim is decorated with prominent red and green jewel-like accents, while the base displays engraved patterns and additional colored inlays. The handles are subtly integrated into the form, extending outward with gold and blue decorative elements. The surface finish appears matte with some glossy highlights on the metallic and jeweled sections. Overall, the vase exudes a sense of ceremonial or decorative importance, suitable for display in a prestigious urban setting.
description: A richly decorated, wide-mouthed vase with gold embellishments, colored gemstones, and engraved patterns, evoking an ancient ceremonial style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main animal motif, gold and blue handle detail, and prominent gemstone inlays on the rim and base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the gold handle and the symmetry of the gemstone placements around the rim.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the curvature of the bowl, the gold and blue handle, and the engraved base pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar decorative features, emphasizing the continuity of the gold and gemstone embellishments.
attribute_pattern: stylized animal motifs and geometric engravings
